  "action_vector": {
      "funding_boost": 0.0,
      "teacher_incentive": 0.8,
      "student_scholarship": 0.5,
      "attendance_mandate": 0.2,
      "resource_realloc": 0.7,
      "transparency_report": 1.0,

      "counseling_programs": 0.9

   "reasoning": "A funding boost right now is too expensive for a stopgap measure, and would blow our budget. Teacher incentives, on the other hand, have shown a tangible impact on retention in the past. I'm willing to take a cautious bet on student scholarships to reduce dropout numbers, but resource reallocation is a better investment. Transparency reports are cheap and give us good optics. As for staff hiring, I'd rather redeploy internal talent than take on new hires. Counseling programs are a proven low-risk way to address burnout and support our students and staff.",
   "confidence": 0.8
}
